scripts.dev: docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml --profile dev up -d --build
scripts.dev:down: docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml --profile dev down -v --remove-orphans
scripts.dev:logs: docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml --profile dev logs -f
scripts.dev:seed: docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml --profile dev exec backend pnpm db:init
